ddls:
CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the business owner */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the business owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the business owner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the business owner */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax identification number of the business owner */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Social Security Number of the business owner */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the owner was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the owner's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "location_x" REAL /* X coordinate of the facility location */,
  "location_y" REAL /* Y coordinate of the facility location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the facility */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the facility */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the facility */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the facility */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the facility was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the facility's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permits" (
  "permit_id" TEXT /* ID of the permit */,
  "permit_release" TEXT /* Release number of the permit */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the permit validity */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the permit validity */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the permit application was submitted */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the permit was approved */,
  "rejected_date" TEXT /* Date the permit was rejected (if applicable) */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for permit rejection (if applicable) */,
  "permit_type" TEXT /* Type of permit */,
  "permit_fee" REAL /* Fee paid for the permit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the permit was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the permit's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the program was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the program's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_codes" (
  "status_code" TEXT /* Status code for the business registration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status code */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the status code was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the status code's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing_statuses" (
  "billing_status" TEXT /* Billing status of the business */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the billing status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the billing status was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the billing status's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_status")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "permit_id" TEXT /* ID of the permit related to the inspection */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "inspection_result" TEXT /* Result of the inspection */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who conducted the inspection */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments made by the inspector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the inspection was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the inspection's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_permit_id FOREIGN KEY ("permit_id") REFERENCES permits ("permit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business related to the document */,
  "permit_id" TEXT /* ID of the permit related to the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document in bytes */,
  "mime_type" TEXT /* MIME type of the document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the document was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the document's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_permit_id FOREIGN KEY ("permit_id") REFERENCES permits ("permit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspector */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the inspector */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the inspector belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the inspector was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the inspector's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id")
)
